data.name: Hentai Tales: Breeding Order 2050
data.detailed_description:
遊戲玩法

在解開燒腦謎題的同時享受香豔故事！
按照數字順序連接所有格子的連線遊戲
每完成一道謎題，即可解鎖全新色氣畫面並推進劇情！
你能解開所有謎題，與女孩們相遇嗎？！

故事背景

西元2050年。今天是決定我作為Alpha菁英未來的重要日子──公民成熟度評估。
然而隔壁那位擁有罪惡肉體的青梅竹馬詩織，正用她豐滿的身軀動搖著我的決心。
在這個基因階級社會中，慾望遭到管制...但覺醒的本能可沒那麼容易壓抑。

角色介紹

香坂詩織：

擁有犯規級W罩杯身材的開朗又愛捉弄人的青梅竹馬。
天真無邪的親密舉動下，隱藏著被培育成誘惑容器的身體，以及將命運與我相連的「Alpha伴侶型S」機密評級。

月讀小夜：

留著長瀏海且擁有違反重力法則的X罩杯神秘少女。
從淡漠言行中透露出「Alpha伴侶型X」身份──專為生育打造的『究極容器』。
雖然總是說著謎般話語，但她的肉體卻訴說著更原始的語言。

遊戲特色

  • 20張美少女們的性感艷麗插圖
  • 與個性鮮明少女們展開的幻想情色故事
  • 可跳過解謎直接享受劇情 (解謎中按下Enter鍵)
  • CG鑑賞模式 (解謎完成後點擊CG旁的左右按鈕)

*具備完整音效支援的語言

  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 4GHz+
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間

  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間

data.name: Hentai Tales: Breeding Order 2050
data.detailed_description:
GamePlay

Enjoy a sensual story while completing tricky puzzles!
Connect the numbers sequentially, using all of the squares on the board
After completing a puzzle, you will unlock a sexy new image and the next part of the story!
Can you complete every puzzle and meet all of the girls?!

Story Background

The year is 2050. Today is my Citizen Maturity Evaluation—the day that will decide my future as an Alpha elite.
But my focus is shattered by Shiori, my voluptuous childhood friend next door, whose sinful body tests my resolve.
In this society of genetic hierarchy, desire is censored… but my awakening urges are not so easily controlled.

Characters

Kousaka Shiori:

My childhood friend blessed with a devastating W-cup figure and a cheerful, teasing personality.
Her innocent closeness hides a body crafted for temptation—and a secret "Alpha Companion-Type S" rating that binds her fate to mine.

Tsukuyomi Sayo:

A mysterious girl with long bangs and an X-cup body that defies gravity.
Her cryptic words and detached demeanor conceal an "Alpha Companion-Type X" status—the ultimate vessel for breeding.
She speaks in riddles, but her body speaks a more primal language.

Features

  • 20 sexy and erotic images of beautiful girls.
  • A fantastical erotic story with girls who have unique personalities.
  • You can skip the puzzles if you just want to enjoy the story. (Press Enter during a puzzle).
  • CG Gallery mode. (Click the left and right buttons next to the CG after completing a puzzle).
